title: vitis ternata
intro: Vitis ternata, also known as the Chinese wild grapevine, is a type of plant native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Vitaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Vitis ternata has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitis ternata often include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
